sourceMovie.title: EXIT
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: EXIT works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If EXIT clicked for you, Shazam! Fury of the Gods (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after EXIT?
faq.answer: Try Shazam! Fury of the Gods, Notting Hill, Airplane!—each shares DNA with EXIT while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is EXIT?
faq.answer: EXIT (2019) is best described as Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is EXIT worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
